S

SELECTED - Enum constant in enum class com.example.eventlottery.WaitingListEntry.Status
 
SelectedEntryAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlottery
 
SelectedEntryAdapter(FragmentActivity, ArrayList<WaitingListEntry>, SelectedEntryAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.SelectedEntryAdapter
 
SelectedEntryAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener - Interface in com.example.eventlottery
 
SelectedList - Class in com.example.eventlottery
 
SelectedList() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.SelectedList
 
sendCancelledEntrantRejoinNotification(FirebaseFirestore, Context, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.NotificationHelper
Notifies a cancelled or declined entrant that they may rejoin the event (organizer action).
sendCoOrganizerAssignedNotification(FirebaseFirestore, String, String, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.NotificationHelper
Notifies a user they were selected as co-organizer for an event.
sendLotteryLossNotification(FirebaseFirestore, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.NotificationHelper
Sends the standard lottery-loss notification (US 01.04.02).
sendLotteryWinNotification(FirebaseFirestore, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.NotificationHelper
Sends the standard lottery-win notification (US 01.04.01).
sendNotification(FirebaseFirestore, String, String, String, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.NotificationHelper
Sends a notification to a specific entrant, but only if they have notifications enabled (US 01.04.03).
sendPrivateInviteNotification(FirebaseFirestore, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.NotificationHelper
Sends a private event waiting list invitation notification (US 01.05.06).
sendWaitingListUpdateNotification(FirebaseFirestore, Context, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.NotificationHelper
Notifies pending waiting-list entrants with an encouraging update (organizer action).
setAdminId(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.AdminProfile
Sets the admin document id.
setCapacity(int) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Sets max accepted entrants; use 0 for unlimited.
setCoOrganizerIds(List<String>) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Sets co-organizer device ids; null becomes empty list.
setCurrentEvent(Event) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventRepository
Replaces the currently held event.
setCurrentEventId(Context, String) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventEditActivity
Persists the given event ID as the currently active event in SharedPreferences.
setDescription(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Sets the event description.
setDeviceId(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.WaitingListEntry
Sets the entrant device id.
setDeviceID(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Entrant
Sets the device id for this profile.
setDeviceIdToName(Map<String, String>) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.SelectedEntryAdapter
Sets display names (deviceId -> name).
setDeviceIdToName(Map<String, String>) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.WaitingEntryAdapter
Sets the display names for entrants (deviceId -> name).
setDisplayName(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
Sets the optional display name.
setEditLockAcquiredAt(long) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Sets when the edit lock was acquired.
setEditLockHeldBy(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Sets who holds the edit lock.

Sets the admin email.

Sets the email address.
setEmail(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
Sets the email.
setEventDateMillis(long) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Sets scheduled event date/time.
setEventId(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Sets the event document id.
setEventIdToStatus(Map<String, String>) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EntrantMainScreenAdapter
Sets per-event status from the waiting list so invitation CTAs are shown for SELECTED/INVITED events.
setEventType(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Sets event type/category.
setEventType(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventFilterCriteria
Sets the event type filter (trimmed).

Sets the admin first name.
setFirstName(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
Sets the first name.

Sets the entrant display name.
setGeolocationRequired(boolean) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Sets whether geolocation is required to join.

Sets when the invitation was sent.
setJoinTimestamp(Timestamp) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.WaitingListEntry
Sets the join timestamp.

Sets the search keyword (trimmed).

Sets the admin last name.
setLastName(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
Sets the last name.
setLatitude(Double) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Entrant
Sets last known latitude.
setLatitude(Double) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Sets venue latitude.

Sets whether the currently loaded event is a private (invite-only) event.

Sets the venue / location text.

Sets last known longitude.
setLongitude(Double) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Sets venue longitude.
setMaxDistanceKm(Double) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventFilterCriteria
Sets the maximum distance from the user position (km).

Sets whether notifications are enabled.

Sets whether to restrict the list to events with registration currently open.

Sets registration window start time.

Sets the event title.
setUserApplicationStatus(String) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Sets UI-only application status for list/detail screens; do not write to Firestore.
setWaitingListLimit(int) - Method in class com.example.eventlottery.Event
Sets max waiting-list size; use 0 for unlimited.
showEventOnEntrantMap(Event) - Static method in class com.example.eventlottery.EventFilterUtils
Returns whether an event should appear as a map pin on the entrant map.
